phase_full_name: Phase 31CH — Runtime Artifact Format / Loader Planning
classification_rationale: All 9 PASS criteria met: SOT was read; 31CH was allowed (SOT Section 0 line 11 explicitly lists 31CH as an alternative next phase, and the user's explicit prompt provided the entry gate); preflight regression passed (PASS_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_RUNTIME_CLEAN, error_count=0, fallback_count=0, readme_drift_guard.passed=true); no validation/generation/runtime was run; no model files were touched; no Q2_K/SDIR blobs were generated; artifact families are defined (sdiw_v1, q2_k, sdir_v1, manifest.json, optional per-layer index, optional bundle manifest); manifest schema v1.1.0 is defined (extension of v1.0 with runtime safety invariants); 48 loader validation rules (R1-R48) are defined; 4 loader architecture options (A: standalone, B: llama.cpp diagnostic, C: runtime integration, D: legacy sidecar reuse — REJECTED) are compared; one recommended next phase is selected (Phase 31CI); SOT is updated; post-edit regression will pass.

source_reviewed: src/bundle_manifest.py (ManifestLoader class, SCHEMA_VERSION_ACCEPTED, ALLOWED_FAMILIES, CANONICAL_ORIENTATION, Q2_K_FORMAT extension)
src/phase31x_manifest_runtime.py (the existing standalone tensor harness runtime primitives)
inputs_NOT_consulted: model binaries (Qwen2.5-1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF at $SDI_MODEL_DIR/qwen2.5-1.5b-official/, HF safetensors at $SDI_MODEL_DIR/qwen2.5-1.5b-hf/ — not opened; SHA-256 hashes from prior committed phases are the only metadata used)
~/llama.cpp/ source (read-only diagnostic inspection only; not modified)

design_decisions.schema_version_relationship_to_v1_0: v1.1.0 is forward-compatible with v1.0. v1.0 bundles remain valid for the standalone tensor harness; v1.1.0 adds runtime safety invariants for the runtime-loadable use case.
design_decisions.bundle_type_for_v1_1_0: runtime_loadable_substitutive (new in v1.1.0; the v1.0 bundle types — source_of_truth_regression, ffn_up_substitutive, ffn_down_substitutive, full_mlp_substitutive, layer_substitutive — remain valid for the standalone tensor harness)
design_decisions.w_low_format_for_corrected_q2k_policy_v1: q2_k (raw llama.cpp Q2_K bytes, mode corrected_ceil_per_row)
design_decisions.recommended_next_phase: Phase 31CI — Runtime Artifact Schema Prototype / Metadata-Only Manifest Validator

runtime_safety_invariants_designed.rationale: These 9 invariants are derived from the 31CF BLOCKED DORMANT_SIDECAR_MACHINERY_INTERFERENCE blocker + the corrected_q2k_policy_v1 policy. Any future runtime loader MUST enforce all 9 invariants before consuming artifacts.

legacy_sidecar_exclusion_designed.rationale: Defense-in-depth to prevent the dormant PRT/SDI sidecar from being silently re-activated by a future bundle. Any future manifest that contains any of these keys (in any nested object) is rejected immediately.

file_naming_proposal.tensor_artifact_naming: tensors/blk.{N}.{family}.q2_k.W_low (raw Q2_K W_low) and tensors/blk.{N}.{family}.residual.sdir (SDIR residual, omitted for ffn_down)

next_allowed_phase.primary: Phase 31CI — Runtime Artifact Schema Prototype / Metadata-Only Manifest Validator
next_allowed_phase.primary_scope: Build a v1.1.0 manifest schema validator (Python module); write a sample metadata-only manifest for 1.5B Qwen2.5-Instruct Q4_K_M; run the validator against the sample manifest; verify all 48 rules pass; cross-reference the per-layer metrics with the existing 31BZ/31CA/31CF-S2 result JSONs. NO model load, NO Q2_K/SDIR blob generation, NO runtime loader implementation.
alternatives: Phase 31CG — Larger Prompt/Token Sensitivity Planning (unrelated to runtime artifact format)

allowed_claims: A runtime artifact format and loader architecture plan for corrected_q2k_policy_v1 has been designed, with manifest schema fields, validation rules, artifact policy, and a recommended next implementation step

The v1.1.0 schema extends the existing v1.0 schema (STATIC_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA.md) with runtime safety invariants (9 invariants) and legacy sidecar exclusion (7 glob patterns) to prevent the 31CF BLOCKED DORMANT_SIDECAR_MACHINERY_INTERFERENCE risk from being silently re-activated by a future runtime

48 loader validation rules (R1-R48) are defined across 9 categories (schema/version, policy invariants, legacy sidecar exclusion, per-layer/per-family, model identity, memory budget, runtime consumer, manifest hygiene, replay artifact)

Four loader architecture options (A: standalone, B: llama.cpp diagnostic, C: runtime integration, D: legacy sidecar reuse — REJECTED) are compared; Option A is selected for the recommended next phase (31CI)
Phase 31CI is recommended as the next implementation step: schema prototype / metadata-only manifest validator, no model load, no Q2_K/SDIR blob generation, no runtime loader implementation

no model files / HF cache / raw activation arrays / build artifacts / Q2_K blobs / SDIR blobs / temp tensor dumps / llama.cpp source committed
no commit/push/tag without explicit operator approval (31CH stops at PRE-COMMIT REPORT)
no policy parameter changes (corrected_q2k_policy_v1 parameters UNCHANGED)
no corrected_q2k_policy_v1 policy version bump (still v1)
